We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

 - ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

 - ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

 - ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.


HOW WE WORK

 - High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

 - Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

 - AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

 - Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

 - Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

 - Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

 - Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

 - Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

 - Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

 - Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.


ABOUT THE ROLE

ElevenLabs operates a complex and fast-evolving revenue model – enterprise contracts, self-serve API subscriptions, usage-based billing, and expanding international markets. As our Revenue Accountant Lead, you will own end-to-end revenue recognition under ASC 606, lead the revenue close, and serve as the internal expert on how new products, pricing structures, and commercial arrangements hit the income statement.

You will partner closely with Sales, Legal, Billing Operations, Engineering, and FP&A to review contracts, assess performance obligations, and ensure revenue is recognised accurately and on time. This is a senior, high-ownership role in a lean Finance team – the right person will manage the technical standards, coordinate external audit, and build scalable processes as we move toward IPO readiness.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Deep expertise in ASC 606, including multi-element arrangements, SSP evaluation, variable consideration, contract modifications, and principal vs. agent analysis

 - Experience leading the revenue close: deferred revenue management, unbilled receivables, journal entry review, and month-end flux analysis

 - Track record of partnering with Sales and Legal on contract review and revenue impact assessments

 - Experience operating in a pre-IPO or public company environment, with direct exposure to external audit, controls build-out, and revenue accounting documentation

 - CPA, ACA, or ACCA qualification (active); Big 4 or public accounting background a strong plus

 - Strong systems proficiency; Stripe, HubiFi or a comparable revenue recognition tool preferred

Bonus:

 - Experience with consumption/usage-based and subscription billing models

 - Familiarity with ASC 326 (CECL) and AR accounting in a high-volume SaaS context

 - Multi-entity or international revenue accounting background


LOCATION

This role is remote-first and open to candidates physically based on the East Coast of the United States (ET timezone). We are not able to consider applicants based in other US timezones at this time. If you prefer, you can work from our office in New York.

#LI-Remote

jobs.title: Events Lead - APAC
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

India is one of our fastest-growing markets, and we're looking for a highly motivated, self-starter Events Marketer to lead the planning and execution of impactful events across India and the wider APAC region. Your work will play a key role in deepening ElevenLabs' presence, driving brand awareness, and generating high-quality pipeline in partnership with our India marketing lead and our GTM teams.

In this role, you will own the full lifecycle of in-person owned events, third-party tech conferences, executive dinners, workshops, webinars, sponsorships, and strategic partnerships. You'll adapt and localize successful playbooks from our US and EU programs for the market, while also identifying new, high-impact opportunities unique to the region.

You will collaborate closely with sales to target the right audiences, build invite strategies, and ensure strong event follow-through. You'll partner with marketing and develop event toolkits, content, and drive post-event analysis to measure success and optimize future activations.

We're looking for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, is comfortable managing multiple projects simultaneously, and brings creativity, operational excellence, and problem-solving to everything they touch. This is a high-ownership, high-autonomy role with the opportunity to build and scale ElevenLabs' event presence across India and APAC — and to create memorable experiences that deliver real business impact.

In this role, you will:

  • Develop and execute event plans that align with business objectives and drive attendance and engagement

  • Organise third-party conferences, owned branded events, and strategic breakfasts/dinners/lunches with key customers or potential clients

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless execution of events, including venue selection, vendor management, and logistics, managing the full end to end planning process

  • Create compelling event messaging and content that resonates with target audiences and drives interest and attendance

  • Manage event budgets and timelines, ensuring all deliverables are completed on time and within budget

  • Analyze event performance metrics and provide recommendations for future improvements and optimizations

  • Follow up with participants in events in collaboration with the sales & growth teams

  • Build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders, including sponsors, partners, and vendors

  • Stay up-to-date on industry trends and best practices, and incorporate them into event marketing strategies to stay ahead of the competition

Who you are

We're looking for exceptional individuals who combine technical excellence with ethical awareness, who are excited by hard problems and motivated by human impact. You'll strive with us if you:

  • Are passionate about audio AI driven by a desire to make content universally accessible and breaking the frontiers of new tech

  • Are a highly motivated and driven individual with a strong work ethic. Our team is aware of this critical moment of audio AI evolution and is committed to going the extra mile to lead.

  • Are analytical, efficient, and strive on solving complex challenges with a first principles mindset

  • Consistently strive for excellence, delivering high-quality work quickly and exceeding expectations

  • Take initiative and work autonomously from day one, prioritizing learning and contribution while leaving ego aside

What you bring

  • 5+ years events experience with three of these years specifically in event or marketing events planning in a fast paced tech organisation

  • Experience working cross-functionally with sales, marketing, product development and comms to execute flawless events

  • Budget and time management skills, within tight deadlines

  • Experience working with event agencies, production partners and come with a black book of great agency partners in region

  • Agile with meticulous attention to detail

  • Confident and able to express ideas and point of view thoughtfully and with passion

  • Transparent and unafraid to challenge, ask questions or call out obstacles

  • Excellent organisational skills and ability to roll up your sleeves to get things done

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build and maintain relationships with stakeholders at all levels of an organisation

  • English fluency is essential, and any additional languages would be a bonus

Location

This role is remote, so it can be executed from anywhere in the APAC region. We're particularly looking for candidates based in Singapore or India.

#LI-Remote

jobs.descriptionHtml:

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

As ElevenLabs scales across enterprise and self-serve segments, a well-run AR function is central to reliable financial reporting and healthy cash flow. As our AR Lead, you will own the accounts receivable lifecycle – from invoice generation and cash application through aging management, credit loss analysis, and process improvement.

You will work closely with Revenue Accounting, Billing Operations, Collections, and Finance to ensure receivables are accurate, current, and audit-ready. This is a high-ownership role for someone who enjoys building systems and can operate with minimal oversight in a fast-moving environment.

Requirements

  • End-to-end AR experience: billing, cash application, reconciliation, aging analysis, and reporting to Finance leadership

  • Familiarity with ASC 326 (CECL) and credit loss estimation methodologies

  • Experience managing AR for SaaS, subscription, or technology businesses – both enterprise and self-serve motions

  • Proficiency with NetSuite or an equivalent ERP

  • Strong analytical skills; comfortable identifying trends, escalating risks, and presenting AR metrics to stakeholders

Bonus:

  • Experience with automated billing platforms or payment processors (Stripe, GCP, AWS)

Location

This role is remote-first and can be executed from anywhere in Europe. If you prefer, you can work from one of our European offices in London, Dublin, Warsaw, or Stockholm.

#LI-Remote

jobs.title: Account Manager - North America - Enterprise Segment
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

You will own the full commercial relationship and customer success across a book of 25 to 50 enterprise accounts - the builders, innovators, and product teams at companies between 2,000 and 10,000 employees who are defining what AI-native experiences look, feel, and sound like. Your job is to make sure every one of them is getting real value, expanding into new products, and renewing with conviction.

This is a high-impact, high-depth role. You'll manage a focused book while building the executive relationships, success plans, and expansion motions that drive meaningful outcomes at scale. If you love the challenge of going deep with complex organizations while keeping commercial momentum, this role was built for you.

On the ground, you'll be in the product with customers - advising on agent design, voice customization, conversation flows, integrations, and using data and logs to spot friction before customers do. You're the person who connects what's working technically to what's growing commercially and partnering closely with high growth accounts to help them achieve value.

Success of the customer and commercial ownership go hand in hand and are at the core of this role. You own NRR across your managed book of business, you drive cross-sell into ElevenLabs' expanding product suite, and you lead renewals end to end. The best AMs at ElevenLabs don't just retain customers, they grow with them.

Compensation

This role offers a competitive on target earnings (OTE) structure with a split of 70% base and 30% variable. Variable compensation is weighted 70% net revenue retention (NRR) and 30% product cross sell. Cross-sell performance counts toward NRR, so strong expansion compounds across both components. Quota is set on managed ARR, giving you clear ownership over a defined book of business. The plan includes accelerators for above target NRR performance and is designed to reward account managers who grow with their customers, not just retain them. Variable compensation is paid on a quarterly basis.

Requirements

  • 5 to 7 years of Account Management or Customer Success experience in B2B SaaS, Developer Tools, or AI/ML products - you have specific, quantified wins at the enterprise level and you can speak to them clearly

  • You own revenue outcomes end to end at the enterprise level - quota, retention, and expansion - and you run the full expansion motion yourself without a sales handoff

  • You've been in deals where the champion and the economic buyer aren't on the same page, and you know how to navigate that without losing the relationship or the deal

  • You can hold a technical conversation with a developer or engineering team and earn their trust - familiarity with AI concepts, API integrations, and SDKs is a must

  • You use product data to stay ahead of your accounts - spotting health signals, identifying expansion opportunities, and getting in front of risk before it becomes churn

  • You can present to a C-suite, troubleshoot with an engineering team, and close with a procurement lead - sometimes in the same week - and you make each conversation count

Preferred

  • Experience in the voice AI, audio AI, or conversational AI space

  • Experience selling or expanding into multiple products within a platform

Location

This role is remote-first, so it can be executed from anywhere in the United States, however the ability to operate in ET, CT, MT, or PT timezones is required. There is a preference for candidates to be based in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work out of our offices in these cities.

#LI-remote

On the ground, you'll be in the product with customers - advising on agent design, voice customization, conversation flows, integrations, and using data and logs to spot friction before customers do. You're the person who connects what's working technically to what's growing commercially and partnering closely with high growth accounts to help them achieve value.

Success of the customer and commercial ownership go hand in hand and are at the core of this role. You own NRR across your managed book of business, you drive cross-sell into ElevenLabs' expanding product suite, and you lead renewals end to end. The best AMs at ElevenLabs don't just retain customers, they grow with them.


COMPENSATION

This role offers a competitive on target earnings (OTE) structure with a split of 70% base and 30% variable. Variable compensation is weighted 70% net revenue retention (NRR) and 30% product cross sell. Cross-sell performance counts toward NRR, so strong expansion compounds across both components. Quota is set on managed ARR, giving you clear ownership over a defined book of business. The plan includes accelerators for above target NRR performance and is designed to reward account managers who grow with their customers, not just retain them. Variable compensation is paid on a quarterly basis.


REQUIREMENTS

 - 5 to 7 years of Account Management or Customer Success experience in B2B SaaS, Developer Tools, or AI/ML products - you have specific, quantified wins at the enterprise level and you can speak to them clearly

 - You own revenue outcomes end to end at the enterprise level - quota, retention, and expansion - and you run the full expansion motion yourself without a sales handoff

 - You've been in deals where the champion and the economic buyer aren't on the same page, and you know how to navigate that without losing the relationship or the deal

 - You can hold a technical conversation with a developer or engineering team and earn their trust - familiarity with AI concepts, API integrations, and SDKs is a must

 - You use product data to stay ahead of your accounts - spotting health signals, identifying expansion opportunities, and getting in front of risk before it becomes churn

 - You can present to a C-suite, troubleshoot with an engineering team, and close with a procurement lead - sometimes in the same week - and you make each conversation count

Preferred

 - Experience in the voice AI, audio AI, or conversational AI space

 - Experience selling or expanding into multiple products within a platform


LOCATION

This role is remote-first, so it can be executed from anywhere in the United States, however the ability to operate in ET, CT, MT, or PT timezones is required. There is a preference for candidates to be based in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work out of our offices in these cities.

#LI-remote

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

Your job is to make sure every one of them is getting real value, expanding into new products, and renewing with conviction.

This is a high-stakes, high-influence role. You'll go exceptionally deep with a small number of transformational accounts, building the executive partnerships, multi-stakeholder relationships, and long-term success plans that turn ElevenLabs into a strategic platform bet for some of the world's largest companies. If you thrive in complex enterprise environments and know how to drive large commercial outcomes through trust and vision, this role was built for you.

On the ground, you'll be in the product with customers - advising on agent design, voice customization, conversation flows, integrations, and using data and logs to spot friction before customers do. This role offers a competitive on target earnings (OTE) structure with a split of 70% base and 30% variable. Variable compensation is weighted 70% net revenue retention (NRR) and 30% product cross sell. Cross-sell performance counts toward NRR, so strong expansion compounds across both components. Quota is set on managed ARR, giving you clear ownership over a defined book of business. The plan includes accelerators for above target NRR performance and is designed to reward account managers who grow with their customers, not just retain them. Variable compensation is paid on a quarterly basis.

Requirements

  • 7 or more years of Customer Success, Strategic Account Management, or Enterprise Partnerships in B2B SaaS, Developer Tools, or AI/ML products - with at least 3 to 5 years in a senior or strategic role and a track record of outcomes you personally drove

  • You've managed large, complex enterprise accounts and have the NRR and expansion numbers to show for it - not team numbers, yours

  • You run full-cycle expansion motions end to end across complex, multi-stakeholder deals - you build the business case, navigate procurement, and close without a handoff

  • You've built genuine relationships at the C-suite level - not just had access to them. You know how to align a room full of stakeholders who don't always agree, and you've got the closed deals to prove it

  • You don't wait for a QBR to know your accounts are at risk or ready to grow - you're always three moves ahead and you have a system for it

  • You can go deep on the product with a developer or engineering team and hold your own without relying on a solutions engineer - strong technical aptitude and familiarity with AI concepts, API integrations, and SDKs is essential

Preferred

  • Experience in the voice AI, audio AI, or conversational AI space

  • Experience selling or expanding into multiple products within a platform

Location

This role is remote-first, so it can be executed from anywhere in the United States, however the ability to operate in ET, CT, MT, or PT timezones is required. There is a preference for candidates to be based in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work out of our offices in these cities.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

You will own the full commercial relationship and customer’s success across a book of 100 to 200 corporate accounts - the builders, founders, and product teams at companies up to 250 employees who are defining what AI-native experiences look, feel, and sound like. Your job is to make sure every one of them is getting real value, expanding into new products, and renewing with conviction.

This is a high-volume, high-impact role. You won't succeed by managing accounts one at a time - you'll build the systems, playbooks, and scaled motions that let you drive meaningful outcomes across a diverse book. If you love the challenge of figuring out how to operate at scale without losing the quality of the customer relationship, this role was built for you.

On the ground, you'll be in the product with customers - advising on agent design, voice customization, conversation flows, integrations, and using data and logs to spot friction before customers do. You're the person who connects what's working technically to what's growing commercially and partnering closely with high growth accounts to help them achieve value.

Success of the customer and commercial ownership go hand in hand and are at the core of this role. You own NRR across your managed book of business, you drive cross-sell into ElevenLabs’ expanding product suite, and you lead renewals end to end. The best AMs at ElevenLabs don’t just retain customers, they grow with them.

Compensation

This role offers a competitive on target earnings (OTE) structure with a split of 70% base and 30% variable. Variable compensation is weighted 100% net revenue retention (NRR) with an emphasis on product cross sell. Cross-sell performance counts toward NRR, so strong expansion compounds across both components. Quota is set on managed ARR, giving you clear ownership over a defined book of business. The plan includes accelerators for above target NRR performance and is designed to reward account managers who grow with their customers, not just retain them. Variable compensation is paid on a quarterly basis.

Requirements

  • Minimum 2 years of Account Management or Customer Success experience in B2B SaaS, Developer Tools, or AI/ML products - you know what good looks like in a technical, fast-moving customer environment

  • A track record of owning commercial outcomes: quota, renewals, cross-sell, and the full expansion motion from identifying the opportunity to closing it

  • Comfortable managing a high-volume book of business with a systems mindset - you build playbooks and repeatable motions, not just individual relationships

  • Hands-on familiarity with AI concepts, API integrations, and SDKs; you can hold a technical conversation with a developer or engineering team and earn their trust

  • Experience using product usage data to stay ahead of your accounts - spotting health signals, identifying expansion opportunities, and getting in front of risk before it becomes churn

  • Strong communicator who can move fluidly between a founder, a technical lead, and a procurement team in the same week

Preferred

  • Experience in the voice AI, audio AI, or conversational AI space

  • Experience selling or expanding into multiple products within a platform

Location

This role is remote-first, so it can be executed from anywhere in the United States, however the ability to operate in ET, CT, MT, or PT timezones is required. There is a preference for candidates to be based in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work out of our offices in these cities.

jobs.title: Strategic Business Development - United States
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

We’re hiring a Strategic Business Development associate to build pipeline within a focused set of high-value accounts.

This is not a traditional SDR role. You are responsible for identifying where ElevenLabs can create real impact inside complex organizations, building relationships across teams, and converting that into qualified opportunities and deal progression.

You will go deep within accounts rather than optimize for activity volume. Success comes from strong judgment, creative outbound, and the ability to generate real opportunities that convert into revenue.

 
 

What you’ll do

Own pipeline within strategic accounts: build and execute account plans across a focused set of high-value companies, identify where ElevenLabs can drive meaningful impact based on org structure, product signals, and business priorities, and create and progress opportunities from first touch through qualification and beyond to later stages of the cycle

Drive multi-threaded engagement: map and engage stakeholders across product, engineering, and commercial teams, build relationships beyond a single entry point, and develop multiple use cases within the same account

Run high-signal outbound: execute highly personalized outreach across email, phone, LinkedIn, and in-person, use AI tools and workflows to identify signals and prioritize timing, and focus on precision and relevance over volume

Operate in-market: represent ElevenLabs at conferences, events, and field activities, identify and engage the right people in live environments, and start conversations without relying on scripts

Partner on deal development: work closely with Account Executives on account strategy and opportunity progression, contribute to shaping deals before and after qualification, and stay involved in strategic opportunities to support expansion and momentum

Continuously improve the motion: refine targeting, messaging, and workflows based on performance, improve conversion across meetings, opportunities, and revenue, and contribute to how this role scales across the company

 
 

Requirements

  • Track record of generating meetings, opportunities, or pipeline in a B2B environment

  • Comfortable engaging multiple stakeholders within complex organizations

  • Strong commercial judgment and ability to identify real opportunities, not just interest

  • Clear and confident written and verbal communication

  • Comfortable using AI tools to increase speed and quality of execution

  • High ownership of outcomes, not just activity

  • Comfortable operating without scripts or rigid playbooks

  • Confidence engaging senior stakeholders

  • Resourceful in understanding how companies operate and where opportunities exist

  • Comfortable walking into a room, identifying the few people who matter, and starting conversations that lead somewhere

Bonus

  • Experience working in AI, developer tools, or fast-moving technical products

  • Exposure to account-based or strategic outbound motions

  • Experience working closely with AEs on deal development

 
 

Location

This role is remote-first and can be based anywhere in the United States. We have a preference for candidates located in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work from our offices in those cities.

 - Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

 - Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

 - Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

 - Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

 - Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

 - Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re hiring a Strategic Business Development associate to build pipeline within a focused set of high-value accounts.

This is not a traditional SDR role. You are responsible for identifying where ElevenLabs can create real impact inside complex organizations, building relationships across teams, and converting that into qualified opportunities and deal progression.

You will go deep within accounts rather than optimize for activity volume. Success comes from strong judgment, creative outbound, and the ability to generate real opportunities that convert into revenue.

 
 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

Own pipeline within strategic accounts: build and execute account plans across a focused set of high-value companies, identify where ElevenLabs can drive meaningful impact based on org structure, product signals, and business priorities, and create and progress opportunities from first touch through qualification and beyond to later stages of the cycle

Drive multi-threaded engagement: map and engage stakeholders across product, engineering, and commercial teams, build relationships beyond a single entry point, and develop multiple use cases within the same account

Run high-signal outbound: execute highly personalized outreach across email, phone, LinkedIn, and in-person, use AI tools and workflows to identify signals and prioritize timing, and focus on precision and relevance over volume

Operate in-market: represent ElevenLabs at conferences, events, and field activities, identify and engage the right people in live environments, and start conversations without relying on scripts

Partner on deal development: work closely with Account Executives on account strategy and opportunity progression, contribute to shaping deals before and after qualification, and stay involved in strategic opportunities to support expansion and momentum

Continuously improve the motion: refine targeting, messaging, and workflows based on performance, improve conversion across meetings, opportunities, and revenue, and contribute to how this role scales across the company

 
 


REQUIREMENTS

 - Track record of generating meetings, opportunities, or pipeline in a B2B environment

 - Comfortable engaging multiple stakeholders within complex organizations

 - Strong commercial judgment and ability to identify real opportunities, not just interest

 - Clear and confident written and verbal communication

 - Comfortable using AI tools to increase speed and quality of execution

 - High ownership of outcomes, not just activity

 - Comfortable operating without scripts or rigid playbooks

 - Confidence engaging senior stakeholders

 - Resourceful in understanding how companies operate and where opportunities exist

 - Comfortable walking into a room, identifying the few people who matter, and starting conversations that lead somewhere


BONUS

 - Experience working in AI, developer tools, or fast-moving technical products

 - Exposure to account-based or strategic outbound motions

 - Experience working closely with AEs on deal development

 
 


LOCATION

This role is remote-first and can be based anywhere in the United States. We have a preference for candidates located in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work from our offices in those cities.

jobs.title: Account Manager - North America - Mid-Market Segment
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

You will own the full commercial relationship and customer’s success across a book of 50 to 100 mid-market accounts - the builders, founders, and product teams at companies between 250 and 2,000 employees who are defining what AI-native experiences look, feel, and sound like. Your job is to make sure every one of them is getting real value, expanding into new products, and renewing with conviction.

This is a high-agency, high-impact role. You won't succeed by managing accounts one at a time - you'll build the systems, playbooks, and motions that let you drive meaningful outcomes across a diverse book while going deep with the accounts that have the most room to grow. If you love the challenge of being a true partner to your customers without losing commercial sharpness, this role was built for you.

On the ground, you'll be in the product with customers - advising on agent design, voice customization, conversation flows, integrations, and using data and logs to spot friction before customers do. You're the person who connects what's working technically to what's growing commercially and partnering closely with high growth accounts to help them achieve value.

Success of the customer and commercial ownership go hand in hand and are at the core of this role. You own NRR across your managed book of business, you drive cross-sell into ElevenLabs' expanding product suite, and you lead renewals end to end. The best AMs at ElevenLabs don't just retain customers, they grow with them.

Compensation

This role offers a competitive on target earnings (OTE) structure with a split of 70% base and 30% variable. Variable compensation is weighted 70% net revenue retention (NRR) and 30% product cross sell. Cross-sell performance counts toward NRR, so strong expansion compounds across both components. Quota is set on managed ARR, giving you clear ownership over a defined book of business. The plan includes accelerators for above target NRR performance and is designed to reward account managers who grow with their customers, not just retain them. Variable compensation is paid on a quarterly basis.

Requirements

  • 3 to 5 years of Account Management or Customer Success experience in B2B SaaS, Developer Tools, or AI/ML products - you know what great looks like and you've delivered it in a complex, fast-moving environment

  • A proven track record of owning revenue outcomes end to end - quota, renewals, and expansion - without defaulting to a handoff to a sales team

  • You approach your book with commercial intent: you segment by expansion potential, keep active expansion conversations going, and build business cases that land with economic buyers

  • You can hold a technical conversation with a developer or engineering team and earn their trust - familiarity with AI concepts, API integrations, and SDKs is a must

  • You use product data to stay ahead of your accounts - spotting health signals, identifying expansion opportunities, and getting in front of risk before it becomes churn

  • You know how to read a room - whether you're with a founder, a technical lead, or a procurement team, you show up with the right message and leave with the relationship stronger

Preferred

  • Experience in the voice AI, audio AI, or conversational AI space

  • Experience selling or expanding into multiple products within a platform

Location

This role is remote-first, so it can be executed from anywhere in the United States, however the ability to operate in ET, CT, MT, or PT timezones is required. There is a preference for candidates to be based in New York City or San Francisco, with the option to work out of our offices in these cities.

#LI-remote

jobs.title: Executive Assistant, Enterprise Deployment
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

ElevenLabs moves fast - and our Enterprise Deployment team sits at the sharpest edge of that speed. Responsible for deploying AI agents into production across the world's largest enterprises, the team has grown from 4 to over 50 people in the last twelve months and operates across every major geography.

This is a high-trust, hands-on role for someone who thrives in technically complex, fast-moving environments and takes genuine ownership of the details that keep senior leaders and their teams running at their best.

You will be the operational backbone for the person who leads Enterprise Deployment - managing calendars, coordinating across time zones and enterprise customer relationships, handling travel, and owning the day-to-day administrative tasks that allow the team to focus on what matters most: deploying world-class AI agents and growing a high-performing global team.

In this role, you will:

  • Manage complex, fast-moving calendars for the leader of Enterprise Deployment and provide scheduling and coordination support across the broader team

  • Own travel logistics end-to-end: flights, accommodation, ground transport, and detailed itineraries across multiple time zones - including customer onsite visits across the US, Europe, and Asia

  • Handle sensitive and confidential matters with discretion, acting as a trusted partner in both professional and operational contexts

  • Coordinate seamlessly with internal teams and external stakeholders, including enterprise customers, C-suite partners, and government and regulated industry contacts

  • Build structure, processes, and systems that scale - including operational documentation, vendor coordination, and team logistics for a 50+ person distributed team

  • Anticipate needs before they arise: managing follow-ups, flagging conflicts, and keeping stakeholders aligned without being asked

Requirements

  • Past experience in executive assistant roles, ideally supporting a senior technical or commercial leader in a fast-moving, high-growth environment

  • Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage competing priorities, shifting timelines, and multiple stakeholders simultaneously

  • Exceptional communication skills, with the confidence to interact with a wide range of stakeholders - from Fortune 500 executives and government contacts to vendors and internal teams

  • High emotional intelligence and discretion - trusted with sensitive commercial and interpersonal information, and able to navigate complex situations with maturity

  • Fluency with AI tools to help improve the quality and speed of work (e.g. Claude or ChatGPT)

Location

This role will require you to be based in London, with the ability to travel into the office as required.

#LI-Remote

jobs.title: Deployment Strategist Lead - Chile
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the role

As a Deployment Strategist Lead, you'll be fully responsible for opening up a new market for ElevenLabs, and building a team to make it happen. This is a senior position in which you’ll operate as if a co-founder, working alongside an experienced sales leader, of an effective startup moving from 0 -> 1 within our broader org, aiming to deploy our voice AI technology at the most Strategic customers in the market against their most challenging problems. All the while you’ll be able to leverage support from the rest of ElevenLabs to accelerate.

You will be responsible for hiring the team you need, winning the first customers in the market and ensuring that our product generates impact for them.

No two days are the same, but you should expect to:

  • Meet with strategic customers to understand their critical audio and voice AI needs and locate their biggest pain points.

  • Build and lead a team of forward deployed engineers within the region.

  • Identify relevant use cases through deep engagement with customer problems and workflows, and work with Engineers to implement our voice and audio AI technology into innovative solutions.

  • Design and architect bespoke integrations for customers, ensuring our technology fits seamlessly into their products and operations.

  • Guide customers on best practices for implementing our voice and audio AI models to maximize their effectiveness.

  • Present the results of our work and proposals for future work to audiences ranging from technical teams to C-suite executives.

  • Collaborate with our Research and Product teams to incorporate field insights into ElevenLabs' software products and AI models.

  • Build and deliver compelling demos of our voice and audio AI technology to new and existing customers.

  • Scope out potential applications in new industries and expand our AI solutions across different sectors globally.

  • Take full ownership of end-to-end execution of major projects for our most strategic partners, working hands-on to deliver high-impact solutions.

  • Collaborate daily with our customers' engineering and executive teams to ensure optimal implementation of ElevenLabs' technologies.

Requirements

  • Executive Stakeholder Engagement: Proven experience engaging and influencing C-suite and VP-level stakeholders, both internally and at customer or partner organizations.

  • People Leadership: Demonstrated ability to hire, develop, and manage high-performing technical teams while fostering a collaborative and results-driven culture.

  • Basic proficiency in Python and understanding of API integration to implement scripts and help with prototyping/demo building.

  • Excellent communication and problem-solving skills, especially in terms of ability to summarize complex technical concepts and using logic in pursuing optimal solutions.

  • Technical aptitude to quickly understand our voice and audio AI models and their applications.

  • Strategic and Commercial Awareness: Ability to align technical strategy with business objectives, with an understanding of deal structures, go-to-market motions, and revenue impact.

  • Nice to have: Partner Ecosystem Development - Experience identifying, building, and nurturing relationships with system integrators, resellers, and technology partners to drive market growth.

Location

The candidate should be based in Chile.

#LI-Remote

 - Guide customers on best practices for implementing our voice and audio AI models to maximize their effectiveness.

 - Collaborate with our Research and Product teams to incorporate field insights into ElevenLabs' software products and AI models.

 - Build and deliver compelling demos of our voice and audio AI technology to new and existing customers.

 - Scope out potential applications in new industries and expand our AI solutions across different sectors globally.

 - Take full ownership of end-to-end execution of major projects for our most strategic partners, working hands-on to deliver high-impact solutions.

 - Collaborate daily with our customers' engineering and executive teams to ensure optimal implementation of ElevenLabs' technologies.

 - Technical aptitude to quickly understand our voice and audio AI models and their applications.

jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive - Singapore
jobs.descriptionHtml:
About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI research and product company transforming how we interact with technology.

We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses - from fast-growing startups to large enterprises like Deutsche Telekom and Meta. Our investors are some of the world's most prominent, including Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth and Sequoia. We've raised $781M in funding and our last valuation was $11B - multiples of 11, always.

We have expanded from voice into three main platforms:

  • ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale.

  • ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages.

  • ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

Everything we do is the result of the creativity and commitment of our team - builders doing the best work of their lives. We are researchers, engineers, and operators. IOI medalists and ex-founders. If you want to work hard and create lasting positive impact, we want to hear from you.

How we work

  • High-velocity: Rapid experimentation, lean autonomous teams, and minimal bureaucracy.

  • Impact not job titles: We don’t have job titles. Instead, it’s about the impact you have. No task is above or beneath you.

  • AI first: We use AI to move faster with higher-quality results. We do this across the whole company—from engineering to growth to operations.

  • Excellence everywhere: Everything we do should match the quality of our AI models.

  • Global team: We prioritize your talent, not your location.

What we offer

  • Innovative culture: You’ll be part of a generational opportunity to define the trajectory of AI, surrounded by a team pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.

  • Growth paths: Joining ElevenLabs means joining a dynamic team with countless opportunities to drive impact - beyond your immediate role and responsibilities.

  • Learning & development: ElevenLabs proactively supports professional development through an annual discretionary stipend.

  • Social travel: We also provide an annual discretionary stipend to meet up with colleagues each year, however you choose.

  • Annual company offsite: Each year, we bring the entire team together in a new location - past offsites have included Croatia and Italy.

  • Co-working: If you’re not located near one of our main hubs, we offer a monthly co-working stipend.

About the Role

We're building a dedicated Strategic Accounts team to own ElevenLabs' most important customer relationships across North Asia, and Singapore, and we're looking for a high-impact Strategic Account Executive to be among the first hires.

This is a named-account role with a focused portfolio. You'll drive new business and expansion inside complex enterprise organizations across North Asia and Singapore — building multi-threaded executive relationships and positioning yourself as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders navigating real transformation across customer experience, product, and operations.

These aren't transactional engagements. You'll architect custom solutions that combine our technology and services, collaborate cross-functionally to deliver measurable outcomes, and bring field intelligence directly into our product roadmap. The region is early-stage for ElevenLabs — you're not just executing a playbook, you're writing it.

In This Role, You Will

  • Own and grow a focused portfolio of strategic accounts across North Asia, and Singapore, driving both net-new business and expansion

  • Develop and execute multi-year account strategies across business units, geographies, and use cases — spanning enterprise segments such as FSI, technology, e-commerce, and government-linked corporations

  • Identify, scope, and close large, complex deals (multi-product, multi-region, custom solutions), including in-country data residency requirements and private deployment configurations

  • Build deep, multi-threaded relationships across executive, product, engineering, and business stakeholders — navigating both HQ and regional decision-making structures

  • Act as a strategic advisor, educating on emerging AI voice trends and shaping customers' long-term AI roadmap in markets with rapidly evolving regulatory and procurement landscapes

  • Partner cross-functionally with Solutions Engineering, Customer Success, and FDE (Forward Deployed Engineering) to deliver and expand — coordinating closely with the Singapore-based team

  • Translate patterns from bespoke deals into repeatable frameworks, offerings, and product insights relevant to the APAC market

  • Feed learnings from the field — including localisation needs, compliance requirements, and competitive dynamics — into the product roadmap and broader strategic sales playbook

  • Drive creative outbound and high-touch engagement strategies: executive briefings, onsites, regional events, and relationship-based approaches suited to North Asia and Singapore enterprise culture

Requirements

  • 6–10+ years of quota-carrying experience with a focus on strategic or enterprise accounts in North Asia and Singapore

  • Proven track record of closing and expanding seven-figure+ deals within named accounts — experience with large North Asia enterprises strongly preferred

  • Experience leading complex, multi-threaded sales cycles across large regional organizations with layered approval processes

  • Strong ability to drive land-and-expand motions and long-term account growth, including navigating renewal and expansion cycles in relationship-driven markets

  • Experience scoping consultative, custom deals that go beyond standard SKUs — including private deployment, on-premise, or VPC-based architectures for regulated customers

  • Technical fluency — able to engage product and engineering leaders on APIs, integrations, architecture, and data security requirements

  • Executive presence with the ability to influence C-suite stakeholders and shape long-term AI strategy in both English-language and Mandarin-language settings

  • Track record of translating customer needs into product feedback and roadmap influence, especially in markets with distinct localisation requirements

  • Creative, self-driven approach to outbound and pipeline generation — comfortable operating in a high-growth, ambiguous environment and building playbooks from scratch

  • Willingness to travel regularly for customer engagements across the region (onsites, QBRs, executive meetings)

  • Strong bias toward action, ownership, and leveraging AI in day-to-day workflows

  • Fluency in English and Mandarin (written and spoken) required; additional regional language proficiency is a strong plus

  • Experience selling into Mandarin-speaking territories and/or Southeast Asian markets is strongly preferred

Location

Candidate must be located within Singapore.

#LI-Remote

 - Develop and execute multi-year account strategies across business units, geographies, and use cases — spanning enterprise segments such as FSI, technology, e-commerce, and government-linked corporations

 - Identify, scope, and close large, complex deals (multi-product, multi-region, custom solutions), including in-country data residency requirements and private deployment configurations

 - Build deep, multi-threaded relationships across executive, product, engineering, and business stakeholders — navigating both HQ and regional decision-making structures

 - Act as a strategic advisor, educating on emerging AI voice trends and shaping customers' long-term AI roadmap in markets with rapidly evolving regulatory and procurement landscapes

 - Partner cross-functionally with Solutions Engineering, Customer Success, and FDE (Forward Deployed Engineering) to deliver and expand — coordinating closely with the Singapore-based team

 - Translate patterns from bespoke deals into repeatable frameworks, offerings, and product insights relevant to the APAC market

 - Feed learnings from the field — including localisation needs, compliance requirements, and competitive dynamics — into the product roadmap and broader strategic sales playbook

 - Drive creative outbound and high-touch engagement strategies: executive briefings, onsites, regional events, and relationship-based approaches suited to North Asia and Singapore enterprise culture


REQUIREMENTS

 - 6–10+ years of quota-carrying experience with a focus on strategic or enterprise accounts in North Asia and Singapore

 - Proven track record of closing and expanding seven-figure+ deals within named accounts — experience with large North Asia enterprises strongly preferred

 - Experience leading complex, multi-threaded sales cycles across large regional organizations with layered approval processes

 - Strong ability to drive land-and-expand motions and long-term account growth, including navigating renewal and expansion cycles in relationship-driven markets

 - Experience scoping consultative, custom deals that go beyond standard SKUs — including private deployment, on-premise, or VPC-based architectures for regulated customers

 - Technical fluency — able to engage product and engineering leaders on APIs, integrations, architecture, and data security requirements

 - Executive presence with the ability to influence C-suite stakeholders and shape long-term AI strategy in both English-language and Mandarin-language settings

 - Track record of translating customer needs into product feedback and roadmap influence, especially in markets with distinct localisation requirements

 - Creative, self-driven approach to outbound and pipeline generation — comfortable operating in a high-growth, ambiguous environment and building playbooks from scratch

 - Willingness to travel regularly for customer engagements across the region (onsites, QBRs, executive meetings)

 - Strong bias toward action, ownership, and leveraging AI in day-to-day workflows

 - Fluency in English and Mandarin (written and spoken) required; additional regional language proficiency is a strong plus

Location

Candidate must be located within Singapore.
